package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for same_struct_used_for_bind_persist_and_respond: A single struct type reused for request binding, database persistence, and API response serialization.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule159NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule159NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule159NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario159Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule159NegativeService, input Rule159NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
